description: MANDATORY anti-overlap (pulled-forward roadmap #184): discriminates the real-boundary integration layer from isolated units (vitest-unit-component-engineer), full-stack browser journeys (playwright-e2e-engineer), contract verification (api-contract-test-designer), and security negative suites (multi-tenant-security-tester).

cases.prompt: Test the invoice-finalize flow through the real service, real Postgres, and the real permission middleware — no UI involved.
cases.reason: Real service/DB/auth boundaries without a browser is the integration layer by definition — not isolated units, not a browser journey, not schema verification.

cases.prompt: Test the invoice total calculation and rounding rules as pure functions.
cases.reason: Pure logic with no real boundary belongs at the unit layer; dragging it through a DB wastes cost for no signal.

cases.prompt: Verify a user can log in, create an invoice in the UI, and see it in the list — full stack in a real browser.
cases.reason: A full-stack browser journey is E2E; integration explicitly excludes the browser.

cases.prompt: Verify our public invoices API still matches its published schema and stays backward compatible with v1 consumers.
cases.reason: Shape/versioning/compatibility verification is contract testing, not end-to-end flow through internal boundaries.
